title: penstemon glaucinus
intro: Penstemon glaucinus, also known as Blue Bat, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Penstemon glaucinus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
